sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: WM Technology to Delist from Nasdaq, Citing Compliance Burdens
feed.summary: WM Technology Inc., parent company of Weedmaps, is voluntarily delisting its shares from the Nasdaq Global Select Market due to thin trading volumes, high compliance costs, and regulatory constraints, transitioning to the OTC Markets. The decision follows previous issues including an SEC settlement for misleading user data, delinquency notices from Nasdaq for late filings, and a failed private acquisition attempt. This move highlights the significant challenges faced by cannabis-related companies navigating complex and evolving regulatory landscapes.

feed.title: Mosaic to Idle Brazilian Phosphate Operations, Pursue Sale
feed.summary: Mosaic Co. announced plans to idle its Araxá and Patrocínio phosphate operations in Brazil, leading to a reduction of approximately 1 million tonnes in annual phosphate production and workforce cuts. The company anticipates a pre-tax charge of $350-$400 million in Q1 2026 but projects annual savings of $20-$30 million in capital spending and $70-$80 million in operating costs after the sale of Araxá assets and development of a niobium project at Patrocínio. TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates MOS as Neutral, citing improved financial resilience balanced by weak cash flow forecasts and mixed near-term fundamentals.

feed.title: Barclays Issues Pessimistic Forecast for Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) Stock Price
feed.summary: Barclays lowered its price target for Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) stock from $80.00 to $72.00, reiterating an "equal weight" rating. This forecast suggests a potential upside of 6.79% from the current price. Other analysts have also adjusted their price targets, with the consensus rating for Brown & Brown being "Hold" and an average price target of $85.27.

feed.title: The Goldman Sachs Group Lowers Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) Price Target to $73.00
feed.summary: The Goldman Sachs Group has reduced its price target for Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) from $82.00 to $73.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating. This adjustment reflects a potential upside of 8.27% from the current stock price. Other analysts have also adjusted their ratings and price targets, resulting in a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $85.27 for Brown & Brown.

feed.title: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) Price Target Raised to $275.00
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) from $262.00 to $275.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating. This new target implies a potential upside of 24.22% for the financial services provider. Despite some analysts lowering price targets, the consensus rating from 19 analysts remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $274.41.

feed.title: Apollo Global Management (NYSE:APO) Price Target Cut to $125.00 by Analysts at Barclays
feed.summary: Barclays analysts recently lowered their price target for Apollo Global Management (NYSE:APO) from $131.00 to $125.00, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. This adjustment comes amidst a mixed sentiment from other analysts, some of whom have maintained "buy" or "outperform" ratings, with a consensus price target of $151.86. The company also faces negative sentiment due to recent securities fraud class actions alleging misstatements.

feed.title: It’s storm season in Indiana: Duke Energy’s investments in smart, self-healing technology are helping keep the lights on
feed.summary: Duke Energy Indiana's investments in "self-healing" technology are significantly improving power reliability during Indiana's storm season, which runs from March to June. This advanced system automatically detects outages and reroutes power, helping to avoid or quickly resolve power disruptions. In 2025 alone, this technology prevented 100,000 outages for Indiana customers, and it now serves nearly half of the company's Indiana service territory, a four-fold increase since 2022.

feed.title: MGM Resorts enters voting agreement with Barry Diller’s IAC, guarantees board seats
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has finalized a voting agreement with its largest shareholder, Barry Diller's IAC Inc. This agreement grants IAC Inc. two board seats while limiting its voting power under specific circumstances. MGM is a major player in the global casino industry, holding a controlling stake in MGM China and developing the $10 billion MGM Osaka integrated resort.

feed.title: The FIFA World Cup 2026™ Trophy Tour by Coca-Cola
feed.summary: Coca-Cola is bringing the FIFA World Cup 2026™ Trophy Tour to St. Louis, Missouri, offering fans a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to see the original trophy up close. The tour will span three host nations (Canada, Mexico, and the United States) and visit 30 FIFA Member Associations across 75 stops, including Kansas City. A special event is scheduled for April 16, 2026, in St. Louis, featuring speakers from Coca-Cola and Heartland Coca-Cola Bottling Company, along with Missouri Governor Mike Kehoe and FIFA Legend Roque Junior.

feed.title: Brown & Brown (BRO): Goldman Sachs Lowers Price Target to $73
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has lowered its price target for Brown & Brown (BRO) from $82 to $73, while maintaining a "Neutral" rating. This adjustment reflects a 10.98% decrease in the anticipated stock value. Other analysts have also recently updated their ratings and price targets for the diversified insurance company, with the average analyst target implying a 23.09% upside from the current price.

feed.title: Better Dividend Stock: ConocoPhillips vs. ExxonMobil
feed.summary: This article compares ConocoPhillips and ExxonMobil as dividend stocks, highlighting their benefits from high oil prices and reputable dividend payouts. While ConocoPhillips offers a slightly higher dividend yield, ExxonMobil is favored due to its diversified energy portfolio, which provides greater stability against oil price fluctuations, and its consistent record of 43 consecutive years of dividend increases. The analysis suggests that ExxonMobil's broader revenue streams make its slightly higher valuation worthwhile for long-term dividend investors.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley flips stance on Europe as continent counts cost of Iran war
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley Investment Management has shifted its stance from overweight to underweight Europe, citing higher energy costs and deeper inflation impacts from the Iran conflict as significant headwinds. The firm is rebalancing portfolios to be overweight in the U.S. and sees opportunities in Asian markets, particularly Japan, as Europe's fiscal stimulus will now be used to buffer against rising energy prices rather than promote growth. Despite a recent ceasefire easing oil prices, Morgan Stanley expects them to remain elevated compared to earlier levels, impacting Europe more severely.

feed.title: SAM Advises Prudential Financial On Sale Of PGIM’s Asset Management Business In India To TVS Venu Group
feed.summary: Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas & Co. (SAM) served as legal counsel to Prudential Financial, Inc. (PFI) for the sale of its entire stake in PGIM India Asset Management and PGIM India Trustees to TVS Venu Group. PGIM India, a wholly-owned subsidiary of PGIM, PFI's global investment management arm, offers a variety of equity, fixed income, and multi-asset solutions for both retail and institutional investors. The transaction is contingent upon regulatory approvals and standard closing conditions.

feed.title: Coca-Cola Marks America’s 250th Anniversary With Limited Collectibles
feed.summary: Coca-Cola is launching a yearlong national program to celebrate America's 250th anniversary in 2026, including limited-edition collectible cans and bottles. The campaign involves state-specific designs, digital interactive experiences, and a creative campaign echoing its historic branding. Beyond marketing, Coca-Cola is committed to community engagement with a goal of 250,000 volunteer hours and a public art initiative.

feed.title: Caterpillar Inc Stock (CAT) Moved Up by 4.23% on Apr 8: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. (CAT) stock gained 4.23% on April 8, driven by strong analyst confidence, robust Q4 2025 financial results, and a record $51.2 billion backlog. The company's Power & Energy segment showed impressive growth, fueled by demand from AI data centers, and it continues to benefit from major macroeconomic trends like infrastructure spending and a mining supercycle. Despite positive momentum, risks include significant tariff headwinds, ongoing patent lawsuits, insider selling, and a recent "Sell" rating from UBS.

feed.title: Align Technology (ALGN) Earns Position on Evercore ISI's Tactica
feed.summary: Align Technology (ALGN) has been added to Evercore ISI's "Tactical Outperform" list, with the firm reaffirming an Outperform rating and a $200 price target. The company, known for its dominant Invisalign product, faces challenges with declining margins and insider selling despite a robust balance sheet and strong market position. Its valuation metrics are mixed, but analyst sentiment remains positive, indicating a "Buy" consensus.

feed.title: Cleo Fields from Louisiana’s 6th district invests in Alphabet Inc. By Investing.com
feed.summary: Cleo Fields, a US congress member from Louisiana's 6th congressional district, recently invested between $1,001 and $15,000 in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) stock. The transaction, executed on March 16, 2026, was made through Fields's Morgan Stanley - ETRADE #2 account. This investment signifies confidence in Alphabet's future, though InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock may currently be overvalued.

feed.title: Martin Midstream will post first-quarter results after the close April 22
feed.summary: Martin Midstream Partners L.P. (NASDAQ: MMLP) announced that its first-quarter 2026 earnings will be released on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, after the market closes. The press release will be accessible under the Investor Relations section of www.MMLP.com. The company, headquartered in Kilgore, Texas, is a publicly traded limited partnership primarily focused on the Gulf Coast region, with operations in terminalling, processing, storage, transportation, and sulfur-based products.

feed.title: NEE Stock Surpasses Industry in 6 Months: What's Next for Investors?
feed.summary: NextEra Energy (NEE) has significantly outperformed its industry and the broader market over the past six months, driven by strong operational performance, a growing customer base, and easing interest rates. The company plans substantial investments in infrastructure and renewable energy, particularly in Florida, and benefits from a low-cost structure and high residential customer base. Despite strong growth prospects and a solid return on equity, NEE is currently trading at a premium, suggesting investors might wait for a better entry point.

feed.title: Hologic Goes Private In $18 Billion Blackstone, TPG Acquisition
feed.summary: Hologic (NASDAQ: HOLX) has completed its $18.3 billion acquisition by funds managed by Blackstone Inc. (NYSE: BX) and TPG Inc. (NASDAQ: TPG), taking the company private. Shareholders will receive $76 per share in cash and a contingent value right (CVR) worth up to $3 per share, tied to Hologic's Breast Health business achieving revenue milestones. José (Joe) E. Almeida has been appointed CEO, succeeding Stephen MacMillan.

feed.title: At US$48.40, Is CTS Corporation (NYSE:CTS) Worth Looking At Closely?
feed.summary: CTS Corporation (NYSE:CTS) recently saw a double-digit share price rise, and its stock appears to be fairly priced at approximately 14% below its intrinsic value according to a valuation model. The company's earnings are projected to increase by 22% over the next few years, suggesting a highly optimistic future. While the current price is fair, potential investors might want to consider the company's balance sheet and await a possible price drop.

feed.title: Kingdom Capital Advisors Benefited from its Shorter-Duration Position in Eastman Kodak Company (KODK)
feed.summary: Kingdom Capital Advisors reported strong Q1 2026 performance, returning 8.01% after fees, significantly outperforming market indices. The firm benefited from avoiding a downturn in AI software stocks and from shorter-duration positions, including Eastman Kodak Company (KODK), which saw gains due to improving profitability and balance sheet strength. KODK has shown a one-month return of 63.02% and an 81.57% gain over the past 52 weeks.

feed.title: Exxon forecasts upstream profit bump of up to $2.9-billion in first quarter from Middle East war
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil anticipates a significant increase in first-quarter upstream earnings, potentially up to US$2.9-billion, driven by higher oil and gas prices due to the Middle East conflict. However, the company faces an estimated US$5.3-billion hit to downstream earnings, primarily due to timing effects, which are expected to reverse in later quarters. Despite a 6% reduction in oil and gas production stemming from the conflict, Exxon expects these market factors to provide crucial insights into the broader oil sector's performance.

feed.title: American Express Just Announced New Lounge Plans for 3 Major U.S. Airports. One Concept Truly Stands Out
feed.summary: American Express is expanding its airport lounge network with new plans for three major U.S. airports. This includes a new Centurion Lounge in Boston, a second Sidecar concept in Charlotte, and a significant expansion of the existing Centurion Lounge at Dallas-Fort Worth. The company is investing in both large flagship lounges and smaller, more efficient spaces to cater to different traveler needs.

feed.title: Brazil shift: Mosaic (NYSE: MOS) idles Araxá, Patrocínio and targets asset sale
feed.summary: The Mosaic Company announced it is idling its Araxá Mining and Chemical Complex and related mining activities at the Patrocínio Complex in Brazil to reduce costs and redeploy capital, which will result in workforce reductions and a planned sale process for Araxá assets. This move is expected to cut annual phosphate production at Mosaic Fertilizantes by approximately 1 million tonnes and will lead to a pre-tax book impact of $350-$400 million in Q1 2026. Despite the significant upfront charges, Mosaic anticipates annual capital expenditures and operating expenses to decline by $20-$30 million and $70-$80 million, respectively, after a potential transaction, with a limited impact on adjusted EBITDA excluding one-time closure costs.

feed.title: Clients approved $38,000 every second on Bank of America's app
feed.summary: Bank of America's CashPro App experienced a 20% year-over-year increase in sign-ins, with clients approving a record $1.2 trillion in payments last year, averaging $38,000 per second. The app has integrated Investment Grade Bond data and AI-driven insights, with plans for further enhancements like redesigned payment approval and digital identity verification in 2026. This growth is attributed to mobile adoption, biometric authentication, push-based approvals, and expanded AI tools for treasury decision-making for over 35,000 client companies.

feed.title: Albemarle Corp stock: What investors should know about its lithium edge now
feed.summary: Albemarle Corp (ALB) is highlighted as a crucial player in the lithium supply chain, vital for electric vehicles and renewable energy. The article emphasizes Albemarle's leadership in lithium production, its diversified revenue streams beyond lithium (like flame retardants), and its strategic position in a booming market, making it an attractive long-term investment for those betting on electrification. It also addresses risks and analyst views, suggesting a "Hold" rating due to balancing lithium's promise against near-term volatility.

feed.title: Ford hit by tariff squeeze, asks White House for help: Report
feed.summary: Ford Motor Company has requested financial relief from the White House due to significant costs incurred from tariffs on imported aluminum and fire damage at a key domestic aluminum supplier, Novelis. The automaker has faced supply disruptions and expects to incur $3 billion in costs, impacting high-volume vehicles like the F-150. Despite the appeal, the administration has not yet provided the requested tariff relief, and recent policy changes could further escalate costs for manufacturers.

feed.title: EVP & Chief Legal Officer Of Marvell Technology Makes $755K Sale
feed.summary: Mark Casper, EVP & Chief Legal Officer at Marvell Technology (NASDAQ: MRVL), sold 6,900 shares of the company worth $755,205, as disclosed in a recent SEC filing. The article also provides a financial overview of Marvell Technology, highlighting its revenue growth, profitability metrics, debt management, and valuation analysis. Insider transactions are discussed as an important, although not sole, factor in investment decisions.

feed.title: IBM will webcast first-quarter results call on April 22 at 5 p.m. ET
feed.summary: IBM (NYSE: IBM) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results and host a quarterly earnings conference call on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. ET. A live webcast will be available on the company's investor website, with press releases, replays, charts, and remarks posted afterward. Historically, similar earnings date announcements have corresponded with a modest positive stock movement for IBM.

feed.title: Mesirow Expands Asia-Pacific Presence with Appointment of Mr. Manabu Ogi and Mr. Katsuya Fukushima to Lead New Tokyo Office
feed.summary: Mesirow, an independent financial services firm, has expanded its Asia-Pacific footprint by opening a new Tokyo office. This expansion is led by the appointments of Mr. Manabu Ogi as Managing Director and Head of Japan, Capital Formation and Currency Solutions, and Mr. Katsuya Fukushima as Managing Director and Head of Sales, Japan. These strategic appointments aim to deepen Mesirow's relationships and better serve Japanese institutional investors with alternative investment capabilities across private equity, alternative credit, direct real estate, and currency solutions.

feed.title: Devon Energy Schedules First-Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Devon Energy (NYSE: DVN) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, May 5, after U.S. markets close. The company will also host a conference call on Wednesday, May 6, at 10 a.m. CDT to discuss the results and answer questions from analysts and investors. Details and webcast links for both the earnings release and conference call will be available on Devon Energy's website.

feed.title: John Deere Settles Right-to-Repair Lawsuit for $99 Million
feed.summary: Deere & Company has agreed to a $99 million settlement to resolve a multidistrict "right to repair" lawsuit, which accused the company of monopolizing repair services and forcing farmers to use corporate facilities. This settlement aims to provide funds to class members and cover legal fees, while Deere also commits to providing customers and service providers with access to repair resources like tools, manuals, and diagnostic software. The agreement follows previous attempts by Deere to address repair access concerns and still requires approval from the U.S. District Court for the Northern District of Illinois.

feed.title: US Bancorp stock: Undervalued gem or regional bank trap?
feed.summary: US Bancorp stock has seen a 53.8% surge over the past year, leading to questions about whether it's an undervalued opportunity or a regional bank risk. The article explores US Bancorp's core business as a stable regional bank, its strong recent performance, and the mixed analyst views on its future. It concludes by discussing the pros and cons for investors, highlighting its dependable dividends and resilience against potential risks like interest rate shifts and economic slowdowns.

feed.title: Stifel Nicolaus Cuts Lincoln Electric (NASDAQ:LECO) Price Target to $264.00
feed.summary: Stifel Nicolaus has lowered its price target for Lincoln Electric (NASDAQ:LECO) to $264.00 from $300.00 while maintaining a "hold" rating, suggesting a 4.38% upside. This adjustment comes amidst mixed analyst views, with the company recently reporting Q4 EPS of $2.65, beating estimates, and revenue of $1.08 billion, a 5.5% year-over-year increase. Despite the lowered price target from Stifel Nicolaus and Barclays, other firms like Morgan Stanley and KeyCorp have either increased their targets or maintained overweight ratings, reflecting diverse opinions on LECO's future performance.

feed.title: Kroger colluded with trucking companies via no-hire agreements, lawsuit alleges
feed.summary: A group of former Quickway Transportation truck drivers has filed a lawsuit alleging that Kroger colluded with Swift Transportation, U.S. Xpress Enterprises, and Werner Trucking Co. through "no-hire agreements." The lawsuit claims that Kroger directed a ban on hiring former Quickway drivers after the grocery chain replaced routes with these other trucking companies, preventing the drivers from securing new employment. The class-action suit, seeking to represent over 100 drivers, alleges anti-competitive collusion aimed at suppressing wages and benefits.

feed.title: Research Alert: CFRA Keeps Hold Opinion On Shares Of Chevron Corp.
feed.summary: CFRA has reiterated its Hold opinion on shares of Chevron Corp. The firm maintains a 12-month price target of $165.00 for CVX, indicating a potential downside of 1.14% from its last closing price.

feed.title: Ford Good Neighbor Plan Invests Nearly $11.7 Million in West Tennessee
feed.summary: Ford's Good Neighbor Plan is investing nearly $11.7 million in West Tennessee. This initiative aims to support local communities, potentially focusing on education, infrastructure, or economic development, demonstrating Ford's commitment to social responsibility in the region.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Initiates an Investigation into Allegations Against Equinix, Inc. (EQIX) And Encourages Shareholders to Reach Out
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has initiated an investigation into potential claims against Equinix, Inc. (EQIX) and its officers/directors for alleged corporate wrongdoing. The firm is encouraging shareholders who purchased Equinix securities before May 3, 2019, and still hold them, to join the investigation. They operate on a contingency fee basis, aiming to recover investor capital and ensure corporate accountability.

feed.title: BNY Launches Homeowner Program Including Down Payment Assistance for Eligible U.S. Employees
feed.summary: BNY has launched a new homeowner program for its U.S.-based employees, offering education, special mortgage benefits, and down payment assistance. Eligible employees earning $100,000 or less annually can receive $6,500 in down payment assistance toward their first home. This initiative is part of BNY's broader commitment to enhancing employee financial well-being, complementing other benefits like child savings, affordable healthcare, and 401(k) programs.

feed.title: Fiber Optic Gyroscope Market Is Going to Boom |• Honeywell International Inc. • Northrop Grumman Corporation
feed.summary: Worldwide Market Reports has released a comprehensive research study on the Fiber Optic Gyroscope Market, forecasting its size and growth from 2026-2033. The report, developed using primary and secondary research, analyzes market drivers, challenges, opportunities, and competitive landscapes, featuring key players like Honeywell and Northrop Grumman. It segments the market by type and application, providing geographical analysis to help stakeholders make informed investment decisions.

feed.title: Henry Schein Announces Board Reduction Plan
feed.summary: Henry Schein, Inc. announced a plan to reduce its Board of Directors from fifteen to ten members following its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. Stanley M. Bergman will retire from the Board after 44 years of service and will be designated Chairman Emeritus. Additionally, Joseph L. Herring, Robert J. Hombach, Scott Serota, and Bradley T. Sheares will not seek re-election.

feed.title: Latest KTF News - DWS Municipal Income Trust Announces Results...
feed.summary: This page provides news and insights for DWS Municipal Income Trust (KTF), an investment-grade, tax-exempt municipal bond fund. News often covers monthly distribution declarations, annual shareholder meetings, and important risk disclosures related to municipal bond investing and closed-end funds. The archive allows investors to track governance, structural updates, and distribution details, including estimated returns of capital.

feed.title: Piper Sandler Remains Cautious on JPMorgan (JPM) Amid Weaker Earnings Forecasts
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has maintained a cautious stance on JPMorgan Chase & Co. (JPM), lowering its price target to $325 from $345 and reducing its EPS estimates for 2026 and 2027 due to weaker earnings forecasts. This follows an earlier report from Wells Fargo acknowledging JPM's strong position to manage private credit exposure despite write-downs. Overall, analysts remain confident in JPM's balance sheet and risk management despite valuation concerns.

feed.title: Evercore ISI lowers McKesson stock price target to $950 on growth concerns
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has reduced its price target for McKesson Corp. (NYSE:MCK) to $950 from $1,000, citing growth concerns, though it maintained an Outperform rating. The firm projects slightly lower-than-Street estimates for Q4 fiscal year 2026 and expects slower adjusted operating income growth in Prescription Technology Solutions due to cash-pay transactions. Despite the lowered target, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock remains undervalued.

feed.title: Joby Aviation (NYSE: JOBY) officer sells shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Joby Aviation's Chief Policy Officer, Gregory Bowles, sold 4,720 shares of common stock at a weighted average price of $8.76 per share on April 6, 2026. This transaction was conducted under a pre-established Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on May 13, 2025. Following the sale, Bowles directly holds 178,470 shares of the company's common stock.

feed.title: Prolonged trading well below historic averages lifts LAES stock more than 2%
feed.summary: SEALSQ Corp (LAES) saw its stock rise by over 2% to $2.17, despite trading significantly below its short, medium, and long-term moving averages. The company recently completed a $125 million direct offering, raising investor concerns about potential dilution. Analysts maintain a bearish outlook due to persistent seller pressure, oversold technical indicators, and a high price-to-sales ratio, predicting continued volatility and limited upside in the near term.

feed.title: Palo Alto Stock: How Anthropic Ended the Cybersecurity Stock Selloff
feed.summary: The article discusses how a recent announcement from Anthropic has positively impacted cybersecurity stocks, particularly Palo Alto Networks, after a rocky start to the year. It highlights Anthropic's continued influence on the cybersecurity market.

feed.title: Buy Johnson & Johnson Stock Ahead of Earnings, Analyst Says. The Run-Up Isn’t Over.
feed.summary: An analyst recommends buying Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) stock ahead of its first-quarter earnings report on April 14, believing that the recent gains can continue. The company's situation has improved significantly over the past year, as it previously faced challenges with patent expiration on a major product and investor skepticism about its future growth. Despite past struggles, the analyst suggests the stock's run-up isn't over.

feed.title: iShares Russell Top 200 Value ETF (IWX) Stock Price, News, Quote & History
feed.summary: This page provides comprehensive financial information for the iShares Russell Top 200 Value ETF (IWX), including its current stock price, historical data, performance metrics, and key statistics. The ETF tracks large-cap value companies within the Russell Top 200 Index, holding assets primarily in component securities and showing solid performance over various timeframes, outperforming its category in 1-year and YTD returns. Also included are sector weightings and related tickers.
